items.title: BloFin Achieves PCI DSS Certification to Strengthen Card Payment Security
items.author: Annio W.
items.description: BloFin, a global cryptocurrency exchange, has achieved PCI DSS certification, demonstrating its commitment to secure payment card data handling and protection. This certification, alongside previous ISO/IEC 27001 accreditation, reinforces the platform's dedication to international security standards.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Mentioned as part of payment networks that developed PCI DSS standard, with no direct action or impact highlighted
